testcase.name: Login to Automation Exercise
testcase.system-out: Given User is on automation exercise Browser................................passed When User click on LoginButton..............................................passed Then Navigate to Login to your account......................................passed When User Enters Email Address and Password.................................passed And Click on Login Page.....................................................passed Then Navigate to Automation Exercise Home Page..............................passed When Click on Add to cart...................................................passed And Click on View Cart......................................................passed Then Click on Proceed to checkOut...........................................passed
